title: Create Better Bars
description: This resource pack offsets the texture of the andesite and copper bars. This makes them more in line with standard Minecraft and look better in my opinion.
body:
So I was playing Create, and wondered: Why are the bar textures split down the middle, instead of having a single block like glass panes. This is especially obvious if you look at the supporting pillars.

![Screenshot of the old bars compared to the glass pane.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680e4bb5df3d07fc3bbeb45a17dc2fed835d5b54.png)

I assume they just copied the iron bar texture, but that one is fine with being offset, since it's quite asymmetrical.

So I decided to make this super simple resourcepack to fix this! 

![Screenshot of the fixed bars.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f900e842bd3875a98ddfd83a1a70e9328a23d27d.png)

I just offset the copper bar item texture 8 pixels to the right, and slightly edited the andesite bar texture to add 2 pillars, instead of 1. This won't change **anything** with the textures or model on the block.

This does mean that this resource pack doesn't interact nicely with other resource packs that edit the bar texture/model, but it shouldn't break anything, just override/be overridden by other packs. I might add a second version that changes the copper bar into having the old Create Copper Style, and will edit this if I do.
